models.code:
class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customer'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String(255))
    credit_limit = Column(Decimal)
    balance = Column(Decimal)
models.description: Model for Customer with credit and balance details.
models.name: Customer

models.code:
class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customer.id'))
    amount_total = Column(Decimal)
    date_shipped = Column(DateTime)
    notes = Column(String(5000))
models.description: Model for orders with customer link and notes.
models.name: Order

models.code:
class Item(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'item'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('order.id'))
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('product.id'))
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    unit_price = Column(Decimal)
    amount = Column(Decimal)
models.description: Model for items within an order.
models.name: Item

models.code:
class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'product'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String(255))
    unit_price = Column(Decimal)
models.description: Model for Product with unit price.
models.name: Product

rules.name: Customer Balance Credit Limit Constraint
rules.description: Ensure the customer's balance does not exceed the credit limit.
rules.code: Rule.constraint(validate=Customer, as_condition=lambda row: row.balance <= row.credit_limit, error_msg='Customer balance ({row.balance}) exceeds credit limit ({row.credit_limit})')

rules.name: Customer Balance Sum Rule
rules.description: Customer balance is derived as the sum of order total amounts for not shipped orders.
rules.code: Rule.sum(derive=Customer.balance, as_sum_of=Order.amount_total, where=lambda row: row.date_shipped is None)

rules.name: Order Amount Total Sum Rule
rules.description: The order's amount total is derived as the sum of all item amounts.

rules.name: Item Amount Formula
rules.description: The item amount is calculated by multiplying quantity and unit price.

rules.name: Item Unit Price Copy Rule
rules.description: The item's unit price is copied from the associated product's unit price.

rules.name: Order Kafka Integration Rule
rules.description: Send Order to Kafka when shipped.
rules.code: Rule.after_flush_row_event(on_class=Order, calling=kafka_producer.send_row_to_kafka, if_condition=lambda row: row.date_shipped is not None, with_args={'topic': 'order_shipping'})

test_data: Customer records have been created with relevant fields.
